author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Julian Lerner from Zombies 4 shares his perfect day in NYC! 🗽❤️ | Lock In | Disney Channel
Watch the newest Disney Channel Videos here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYDR_VUUcVIxkjNd_ozPFwAU

Lock In: Disney stars open up a locker filled with items that spark conversations about memories and moments that have shaped them so far.
